basic_details.job_title: IIEST Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology (IIEST), Shibpur

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 32 years (Relaxable for SC/ST/Woman and physically handicapped candidates)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Woman and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.E. in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or equivalent discipline with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (55% marks or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD) with valid GATE/NET.
qualification.details: M.Tech./M.E. in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or equivalent discipline from a recognized University/ Institute with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA on a 10-point scale with valid GATE/ NET. For SC/ST/PwD category, a minimum 55% marks or 6.0 CGPA on 10-point scale is required with valid GATE/NET.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 48100/- per month (with GATE/NET) or Rs. 40300/- per month (without GATE/NET)
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + Rs. 11,100/- HRA (30%) = Rs. 48100/- per month (with GATE/NET) Rs. 31,000/- + Rs. 9,300/- HRA (30%) = Rs. 40300/- per month (without GATE/NET)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIEST Project Associate - 1 Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIEST Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIEST Project Associate - 1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 03-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - 1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech./M.E. in Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or an equivalent discipline with at least 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA. A valid GATE/NET score is also required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/Woman and physically handicapped candidates. The maximum age limit of 32 years is relaxed for these categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - 1 position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 48100/- per month for candidates with a valid GATE/NET score and Rs. 40300/- per month for those without a GATE/NET score.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate - 1 role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a walk-in interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is via email. Interested candidates need to send their application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit self-attested copies of their application letter, bio-data, mark sheets, and certificates. Recent passport-size photographs are also required.

faq.question: Q8. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Associate - 1 position will be held on 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Associate - 1 post at IIEST, Shibpur.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIEST, Shibpur located?
faq.answer: IIEST, Shibpur is located in Shibpur, West Bengal, with the pincode 711103.
